Defines and manages JerryScript library functions and class constructors for Mbed OS.

## Folders
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Defines a singleton `LibraryRegistry` and functions to register global functions and class constructors in JerryScript for Mbed OS.

## Files
- **[registry.h](registry.h.md)**: Defines a singleton class for managing and registering JerryScript library functions in Mbed OS.
- **[wrap_tools.h](wrap_tools.h.md)**: Functions for registering global functions, class constructors, and class functions in JerryScript.
